action.content: The UK is a country in Western Europe with a population of around 67 million people. It has a rich history dating back to the 5th century when the Anglo-Saxons arrived. The UK has a constitutional monarchy with the British monarch as the head of state. The UK has a parliamentary system of government with the Prime Minister as the head of government.
